subcodes.first_line: O our Lord! Behold us as we spread the wings of abasement and contrition, supplicating unto the Kingdom of Lights, submitting with utter humility [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ربنا ترانا ننشر اجنحه الذل و الانکسار و نبتهل الی ملکوت الانوار و نخضع خضوع
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @rejection, opposition and persecution, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @love and unity, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @consolation and comfort
